<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 5982 => 'Montevideo', 59842 => 'San Carlos', 598433 => 'Canelones', 598434 => 'San Jose de Mayo', 598435 => 'Florida', 598436 => 'Durazno', 5984364 => 'Trinidad/Flores', 598444 => 'Minas/Lavalleja', 598445 => 'Treinta y Tres', 598447 => 'Rocha', 598452 => 'Colonia del Scaramento', 598453 => 'Mercedes/Soriano', 598456 => 'Fray Bentos/Rio Negro', 598462 => 'Rivera', 598463 => 'Tacuarembo', 598464 => 'Melo/Cerro Largo', 598472 => 'Paysandu', 598473 => 'Salto', 598477 => 'Artigas', ];
